member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore
member.summary: Unified core accessor for V Rising game server integration. Provides safe access to World, EntityManager, ServerGameManager, and PrefabCollection. Uses main-thread guard pattern for thread safety in V Rising's modified Unity ECS.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.Server
member.summary: Gets the server World. Lazy initializes on first access using main-thread guard pattern.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.EntityManager
member.summary: Gets the EntityManager from the server World.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.PrefabCollection
member.summary: Gets the PrefabCollectionSystem if available. Returns null on failure.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.IsInitialized
member.summary: Checks if the core has been initialized.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.Reset
member.summary: Resets the core for testing purposes.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.LogInfo(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an info message with caller context.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.LogError(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an error message with caller context.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.LogWarning(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a warning message with caller context.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.LogException(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an exception with caller context.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.TryGetPrefabEntity(Stunlock.Core.PrefabGUID,Unity.Entities.Entity@)
member.summary: Tries to get the entity for a given PrefabGUID.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.GetPrefabEntity(Stunlock.Core.PrefabGUID)
member.summary: Gets the entity for a given PrefabGUID. Throws if not found.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.CreateEntity(Unity.Entities.ComponentType[])
member.summary: Creates a new entity with the specified component types.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.CreateEntity(Unity.Mathematics.float3,Unity.Mathematics.quaternion,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new entity and sets its transform.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.DestroyEntity(Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Destroys an entity if it exists.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.EntityExists(Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Checks if an entity exists.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.UnifiedCore.GetWorld(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a World by name from Unity's World registry.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger
member.summary: Centralized logging service with caller context support. Provides structured logging methods for consistent output across all mods.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new logger with the specified source.
member.param: The source name for log messages.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.#ctor(BepInEx.Logging.ManualLogSource,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new logger with an explicit log sink and source.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.Info(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an informational message with caller context.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.LogInfo(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an informational message (alias for Info).

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.Error(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an error message with caller context.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.LogError(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an error message (alias for Error).

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.Warning(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a warning message with caller context.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.LogWarning(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a warning message (alias for Warning).

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.Debug(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a debug message with caller context. Only outputs in DEBUG builds.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.LogDebug(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a debug message (alias for Debug).

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.Exception(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an exception with full stack trace and caller context.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.InfoFormat(System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Logs a formatted informational message.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.ErrorFormat(System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Logs a formatted error message.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.IsInitialized
member.summary: Gets whether the CoreLogger has been initialized.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.Initialize(BepInEx.Logging.ManualLogSource)
member.summary: Initialize the static logger with a log source.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.LogInfoStatic(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an informational message statically.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.LogWarningStatic(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a warning message statically.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.LogErrorStatic(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an error message statically.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.LogDebugStatic(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a debug message statically.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger.LogException(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an exception statically.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLoggerExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for CoreLogger providing ForContext functionality.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLoggerExtensions.ForContext(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a logger with a context prefix.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Arena.ArenaLifecycleManager
member.summary: Manages arena lifecycle events and state.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Arena.ArenaLifecycleManager.OnPlayerEntered(Unity.Entities.Entity,System.String)
member.summary: Handles player entering an arena zone.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Arena.ArenaLifecycleManager.OnPlayerExited(Unity.Entities.Entity,System.String)
member.summary: Handles player exiting an arena zone.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Arena.ArenaLifecycleManager.Initialize
member.summary: Initializes the arena lifecycle manager.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Arena.ArenaLifecycleManager.Shutdown
member.summary: Shuts down the arena lifecycle manager.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.ConfigService
member.summary: Centralized configuration service with concurrent caching and lazy loading. Provides safe JSON serialization/deserialization for mod configurations.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.ConfigService.ConfigRootPath
member.summary: Gets the root folder where VAutomationCore configuration files are stored.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.ConfigService.GetConfig``1(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a configuration object of type T, loading from disk if not cached.
member.typeparam: The configuration type (must have parameterless constructor).
member.param: Optional custom filename. Defaults to type name + ".json".

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.ConfigService.TryGetConfig``1(``0@,System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to get a configuration object without throwing exceptions to callers.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.ConfigService.SaveConfig``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Saves a configuration object to disk and updates the cache.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.ConfigService.TrySaveConfig``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to save a configuration object and returns success/failure.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.ConfigService.ReloadConfig``1(System.String)
member.summary: Reloads a configuration from disk, bypassing cache.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.ConfigService.GetConfigFullPath``1(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the full path to a specific config file for type T.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.ConfigService.ConfigExists``1(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a configuration file exists.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.ConfigService.ClearCache
member.summary: Clears all cached configurations.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.Float3JsonConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for Unity.Mathematics.float3 type. Serializes as an array [x, y, z].

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.Float2JsonConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for Unity.Mathematics.float2 type. Serializes as an array [x, y].

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.Int2JsonConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for Unity.Mathematics.int2 type. Serializes as an array [x, y].

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.QuaternionJsonConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for Unity.Mathematics.quaternion type. Serializes as an array [x, y, z, w].

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.PrefabGuidJsonConverter
member.summary: JSON converter for ProjectM.PrefabGUID type. Serializes as a GUID string or object with Id and Name properties.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Config.TypedJsonConfigManager
member.summary: Shared typed JSON config loader/saver with optional validation. Centralizes file IO, directory creation, and error handling.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityQueryHelper
member.summary: Helper methods for EntityQuery operations. Provides safe synchronous query operations compatible with V Rising's modified Unity ECS. Note: Avoid async/await in ECS code - use sync processing instead.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityQueryHelper.CreateQuery(Unity.Entities.EntityManager,Unity.Entities.ComponentType[])
member.summary: Creates a query with All component types.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityQueryHelper.CreateQuery(Unity.Entities.EntityManager,Unity.Entities.ComponentType[],Unity.Entities.ComponentType[],Unity.Entities.ComponentType[])
member.summary: Creates a query with All/Any/None component constraints.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityQueryHelper.ProcessEntities(Unity.Entities.EntityQuery,System.Action{Unity.Entities.Entity})
member.summary: Processes entities synchronously with a handler action.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityQueryHelper.ProcessEntities``1(Unity.Entities.EntityQuery,System.Action{Unity.Entities.Entity,``0})
member.summary: Processes entities with component data synchronously.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityQueryHelper.ProcessEntitiesBatched``1(Unity.Entities.EntityQuery,System.Action{Unity.Entities.Entity,``0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Processes entities in batches synchronously. Useful for large entity counts to allow frame updates.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityQueryHelper.GetEntityCount(Unity.Entities.EntityQuery)
member.summary: Gets entity count for a query.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityQueryHelper.HasEntities(Unity.Entities.EntityQuery)
member.summary: Checks if any entities match the query.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for Entity and EntityManager operations. Provides safe, typed access to common ECS operations.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.HasComponent``1(Unity.Entities.EntityManager,Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Checks if an entity has a component of type T.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.GetComponent``1(Unity.Entities.EntityManager,Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Gets a component from an entity. Returns default if not found.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.SetComponent``1(Unity.Entities.EntityManager,Unity.Entities.Entity,``0)
member.summary: Sets a component on an entity safely.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.Exists(Unity.Entities.EntityManager,Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Checks if an entity exists.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.GetOrAddComponent``1(Unity.Entities.EntityManager,Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Gets or adds a component to an entity.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.Has``1(Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Checks if an entity has a component of type T.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.Get``1(Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Gets a component from an entity.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.Set``1(Unity.Entities.Entity,``0)
member.summary: Sets a component on an entity.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.GetPosition(Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Gets the position component from an entity.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.SetPosition(Unity.Entities.Entity,Unity.Mathematics.float3)
member.summary: Sets the position component on an entity.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.GetRotation(Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Gets the rotation component from an entity.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.SetRotation(Unity.Entities.Entity,Unity.Mathematics.quaternion)
member.summary: Sets the rotation component on an entity.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.GetScale(Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Gets the scale component from an entity.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.SetScale(Unity.Entities.Entity,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the scale component on an entity.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.CreateTransform(Unity.Mathematics.float3,Unity.Mathematics.quaternion,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a LocalTransform from position, rotation, and scale.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.DistanceTo(Unity.Entities.Entity,Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Calculates the distance between two entities.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.EntityExtensions.DistanceSquaredTo(Unity.Entities.Entity,Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Calculates the squared distance between two entities.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.PrefabGUIDExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for PrefabGUID operations. Provides safe access to PrefabGUID data including name resolution.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.PrefabGUIDExtensions.Name(Stunlock.Core.PrefabGUID)
member.summary: Gets the prefab name from a PrefabGUID using cached lookup. Falls back to hex string if not found.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.PrefabGUIDExtensions.LookupName(Stunlock.Core.PrefabGUID)
member.summary: Compatibility alias used by Bluelock command surfaces.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.PrefabGUIDExtensions.GetPrefabName(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the prefab name from a GUID hash.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.PrefabGUIDExtensions.EnsureInitialized
member.summary: Ensures the prefab name cache is loaded.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.PrefabGUIDExtensions.IsValid(Stunlock.Core.PrefabGUID)
member.summary: Checks if a PrefabGUID is valid (non-zero hash).

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.ECS.PrefabGUIDExtensions.ToHexString(Stunlock.Core.PrefabGUID)
member.summary: Gets the GUID hash as a string for display/logging.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase
member.summary: Base class for chat commands providing common functionality. Provides Execute() abstract method, permission handling, cooldowns, and rich feedback.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.Log
member.summary: Gets the CoreLogger for this command.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.EM
member.summary: Gets the EntityManager.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.Execute(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext)
member.summary: Abstract method that subclasses must implement to execute command logic.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.EnsureReady
member.summary: Ensures the core systems are ready before executing a command.

members.member: Checks if the command sender has the required permission level.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.RequirePermission(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.PermissionLevel)
member.summary: Throws if sender doesn't have required permission.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.IsOnCooldown(System.String,System.UInt64,System.TimeSpan,System.TimeSpan@)
member.summary: Checks if a command is on cooldown for the given player.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.SetCooldown(System.String,System.UInt64,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sets a cooldown for a command for the given player.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.ClearCooldown(System.String,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Clears a cooldown for a command for the given player.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.RequireCooldown(System.String,System.UInt64,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Checks and applies cooldown, throwing if on cooldown.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.SendFeedback(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.FeedbackType,System.String)
member.summary: Sends formatted feedback to the player with consistent styling.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.SendSuccess(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sends a success feedback with optional data.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.SendError(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sends an error feedback with explanation.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.SendInfo(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String)
member.summary: Sends info feedback with context.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.SendLocation(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String,Unity.Mathematics.float3)
member.summary: Sends location data (x, y, z).

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.SendCount(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sends count/number data.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.Reply(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replies to the command sender with a colored message.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.ReplySuccess(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String)
member.summary: Replies with a success message (green).

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.ReplyError(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String)
member.summary: Replies with an error message (red).

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.ReplyWarning(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String)
member.summary: Replies with a warning message (yellow).

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.ReplyInfo(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String)
member.summary: Replies with an info message (cyan).

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.ReplyDebug(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String)
member.summary: Replies with a debug message (gray) - only in debug builds.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.Execute(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String)
member.summary: Executes the command with full error handling and logging.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.ExecuteSafely(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext,System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Safely executes action with exception handling.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.LogCommand(System.String,VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.PlayerInfo)
member.summary: Logs a command execution with caller context.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.GetPlayerInfo(VampireCommandFramework.ChatCommandContext)
member.summary: Gets player info from context.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.QueryEntities(Unity.Entities.EntityQuery,Unity.Collections.Allocator)
member.summary: Safely queries entities and returns empty array on error.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandBase.QueryCount(Unity.Entities.EntityQuery)
member.summary: Safely queries component count.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.PermissionLevel
member.summary: Permission levels for command access.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.FeedbackType
member.summary: Types of feedback for consistent messaging.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.PlayerInfo
member.summary: Player information from command context.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a command encounters an error. This exception is caught by CommandBase and displayed to the user.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new CommandException with the specified message.
member.param: The error message to display to the user.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.CommandException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Creates a new CommandException with a message and inner exception.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor
member.summary: Defines standard chat colors for use in command responses.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.White
member.summary: White color (default).

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.Green
member.summary: Green color for success messages.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.Red
member.summary: Red color for error messages.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.Yellow
member.summary: Yellow color for warning messages.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.Cyan
member.summary: Cyan color for info messages.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.Magenta
member.summary: Magenta color.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.Orange
member.summary: Orange/Amber color.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.Gray
member.summary: Light gray color for debug messages.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.DarkGray
member.summary: Dark gray color.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.LightBlue
member.summary: Light blue color.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.Pink
member.summary: Pink color.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.Lime
member.summary: Lime green color.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Commands.ChatColor.Gold
member.summary: Gold color.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.IServiceRegistryApi
member.summary: Centralized API signature contracts for the VAutomationCore API surface. This file is intentionally signature-only to provide a single reference point.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.CastleApi
member.summary: Castle-related shared state API. This is a lightweight cross-module registry for castle ownership/flags.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.CommandApi
member.summary: Command-related APIs for runtime command/flow integration.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ConsoleRoleAuthService
member.summary: Console/session authorization with explicit roles. Developer role is the only role allowed to execute job flows.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ConsoleRoleAuthService.CanUseJobs(System.UInt64,System.TimeSpan@,VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ConsoleRoleAuthService.ConsoleRole@)
member.summary: Developer-only gate for job capabilities. Admin role is intentionally insufficient for job execution.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.CoreExecution
member.summary: Safe execution helpers with consistent error handling and retry support.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityAliasMapper
member.summary: Registers user-friendly aliases for ECS component types and maps aliases to component access.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityMap
member.summary: Alias map for runtime entities and values used by flow execution.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityMap.SetEntity(System.String,Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Maps an entity to an alias.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityMap.SetString(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Maps a string value to an alias.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityMap.SetInt(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Maps an integer value to an alias.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityMap.SetFloat3(System.String,Unity.Mathematics.float3)
member.summary: Maps a float3 value to an alias.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityMap.TryGetString(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get a string value by alias.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityMap.TryGetInt(System.String,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Tries to get an integer value by alias.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityMap.TryGetFloat3(System.String,Unity.Mathematics.float3@)
member.summary: Tries to get a float3 value by alias.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityMap.TryMapUserByPlatformId(System.String,System.UInt64,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Convenience mapping from platform ID to User entity.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityAliasRef
member.summary: Alias reference resolved from an EntityMap at flow execution time.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.FlowStep
member.summary: One step in a named flow.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.MustFlowStep
member.summary: A required flow step that can be marked critical.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.FlowDefinition
member.summary: Named flow definition containing ordered action steps.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.FlowExecutionResult
member.summary: Result of flow execution.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.FlowService
member.summary: Runtime service for registering and executing action flows with entity aliases.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.FlowService.RegisterModuleFlows(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,VAutomationCore.Core.Api.FlowDefinition},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Registers all flows owned by a module in one operation. When replace=true, previously registered flows for the module are removed first. Compatibility note: this API is additive and does not remove existing single-flow registration methods.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.FlowService.UnregisterModuleFlows(System.String)
member.summary: Unregisters all flows owned by a module.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.FlowService.TryExecuteFlow(System.String,VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityMap,VAutomationCore.Core.Api.FlowExecutionResult@)
member.summary: Tries to execute a named flow. Returns false when the flow is missing or execution fails.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.FlowService.ExecuteJobFlow(System.String,VAutomationCore.Core.Api.EntityMap,System.UInt64,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Executes a flow as a job operation using role-gated authorization. Only Developer role is allowed to run jobs.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.OperationResult
member.summary: Represents the outcome of an operation that can fail.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.OperationResult`1
member.summary: Represents the outcome of an operation that returns a value.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.PlayerApi
member.summary: Player/session APIs shared across modules. Uses subject id (platform id or console subject id) as the stable key.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.RetryPolicy
member.summary: Defines retry behavior for transient-failure operations.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.RetryPolicy.Default
member.summary: Default policy: 3 attempts, exponential backoff, jitter enabled.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.RetryPolicy.MaxAttempts
member.summary: Total attempts including the first attempt.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.RetryPolicy.InitialDelay
member.summary: Delay used for the second attempt before backoff is applied.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.RetryPolicy.BackoffMultiplier
member.summary: Backoff multiplier between attempts.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.RetryPolicy.MaxDelay
member.summary: Upper bound for computed delay.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.RetryPolicy.UseJitter
member.summary: Adds up to 20% random jitter to reduce thundering herd effects.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.RetryPolicy.ShouldRetryException
member.summary: Optional filter controlling which exceptions are retryable.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ServerApi
member.summary: Server-level helpers for readiness and ECS access.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ServiceRegistry
member.summary: Type-safe runtime service registry for cross-module APIs.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ServiceRegistry.RegisterSingleton``1(``0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Registers a singleton service instance.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ServiceRegistry.TryResolve``1(``0@)
member.summary: Attempts to resolve a registered service.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ServiceRegistry.GetRequired``1
member.summary: Resolves a registered service or throws when missing.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ServiceRegistry.IsRegistered``1
member.summary: Returns true when service type TService is currently registered.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ServiceRegistry.Remove``1
member.summary: Removes a service registration.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ServiceRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Clears all service registrations.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ServiceRegistry.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of currently registered services.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Api.ServiceRegistry.GetRegisteredTypes
member.summary: Returns a snapshot of currently registered service types.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Lifecycle.IZoneEnterStep
member.summary: Ordered step executed during zone enter.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Lifecycle.IZoneExitStep
member.summary: Ordered step executed during zone exit.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Lifecycle.IZoneLifecycleContext
member.summary: Shared context passed to zone lifecycle steps.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Lifecycle.IZoneLifecycleStepRegistry
member.summary: Registry for enter/exit lifecycle steps.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Lifecycle.ZoneRuntimeModeOptions
member.summary: Runtime mode options for zone execution pipeline. Note: Legacy and Hybrid modes are deprecated and normalized to ECS-only behavior.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Lifecycle.ZoneRuntimeModeOptions.WasDeprecatedModeRequested
member.summary: True if a deprecated runtime mode (Legacy or Hybrid) was requested. Consumers should log a warning when this is true.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Lifecycle.ZoneRuntimeModeOptions.GetDeprecationWarning
member.summary: Gets a human-readable warning message for deprecated mode usage.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.TrapLifecycle.TrapLifecycleContext
member.summary: Context passed into trap lifecycle policy checks.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.TrapLifecycle.TrapLifecycleDecision
member.summary: Result of evaluating a trap lifecycle policy decision.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.TrapLifecycle.ITrapLifecyclePolicy
member.summary: Shared contract for trap lifecycle policy providers.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.TrapLifecycle.TrapPolicyResolver
member.summary: Shared resolver used by lifecycle consumers to evaluate trap policy overrides.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Events.TypedEventBus
member.summary: Lightweight in-process typed event bus.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Events.TypedEventBus.SubscribeScoped``1(System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Subscribes to an event and returns a disposable unsubscriber.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Events.TypedEventBus.PublishAndCount``1(``0)
member.summary: Publishes an event and returns the number of handlers that ran successfully.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Events.TypedEventBus.GetSubscriberCount``1
member.summary: Gets subscriber count for a specific event type.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Events.TypedEventBus.HasSubscribers``1
member.summary: Returns true when at least one subscriber is registered for event type T.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Services.ServiceInitializer
member.summary: Centralized service initializer for static-only services. Provides ordered initialization and validation for all mod services.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Services.ServiceInitializer.InitializeLogger(VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger)
member.summary: Initializes the ServiceInitializer with a logger. Must be called before using RegisterInitializer or InitializeAll.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Services.ServiceInitializer.RegisterInitializer(System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Registers an initializer for a service.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Services.ServiceInitializer.RegisterValidator(System.String,System.Func{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Registers a validator for a service.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Services.ServiceInitializer.InitializeAll(VAutomationCore.Core.Logging.CoreLogger)
member.summary: Initializes all registered services in order.
member.returns: True if all services initialized successfully.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Services.ServiceInitializer.InitializeAll
member.summary: Initializes all registered services in order.
member.returns: True if all services initialized successfully.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Services.ServiceInitializer.InitializeService(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a specific service by name.
member.returns: True if the service initialized successfully.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Services.ServiceInitializer.ValidateService(System.String)
member.summary: Validates a specific service by name.
member.returns: True if the service is valid.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Services.ServiceInitializer.Reset
member.summary: Resets all registrations and initialization state. Use for testing only.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Services.ServiceInitializer.ServiceCount
member.summary: Gets the count of registered services.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Core.Services.ServiceInitializer.IsInitialized
member.summary: Checks if all services have been initialized.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Core.Services.ServiceInitializer.GetServiceNames
member.summary: Gets a list of all registered service names.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Core.Data.ConsoleRoleComponent
member.summary: Runtime auth role stored on a user entity for ECS-driven checks and tooling.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Data.ConsoleRoleComponent.Role
member.summary: 0=None, 1=Admin, 2=Developer.

member.name: F:VAutomationCore.Core.Data.ConsoleRoleComponent.ExpiresAtUnixSeconds
member.summary: Session expiration in UTC Unix seconds. 0 means not set.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Services.GameActionService
member.summary: Runtime action helpers used by flow execution and cross-module services.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Services.GameActionService.TrySpawnBoss(System.String,Unity.Mathematics.float3,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Spawns a boss entity at the specified position. Note: This is a stub - use the "boss_enter" lifecycle action for actual boss spawning.
member.returns: True (stub always succeeds - actual spawning handled by lifecycle action)

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Services.GameActionService.TryRemoveBoss(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a boss entity from the specified zone.
member.returns: True if removal successful (boss was present)

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Services.ZoneEventBridge
member.summary: Event bridge for zone-related events with observability.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Services.ZoneEventBridge.PublishPlayerEntered(Unity.Entities.Entity,System.String)
member.summary: Publishes a player entered zone event with state machine and debouncing.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Services.ZoneEventBridge.GetPlayerId(Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Gets a player identifier for logging purposes.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Services.ZoneEventBridge.PublishPlayerExited(Unity.Entities.Entity,System.String)
member.summary: Publishes a player exited zone event with state machine and cleanup.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Services.ZoneEventBridge.GetPlayerZoneState(Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Gets the current zone state for a player.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Services.ZoneEventBridge.UpdatePlayerZoneState(Unity.Entities.Entity,VAutomationCore.Models.PlayerZoneState)
member.summary: Updates the zone state for a player.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Services.ZoneEventBridge.RemovePlayerZoneState(Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Removes the zone state for a player.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Services.ZoneEventBridge.ShouldApplyDebounce(VAutomationCore.Models.PlayerZoneState,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if debouncing should be applied based on rapid transition detection.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Services.ZoneEventBridge.GetCurrentZone(Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Gets the current zone for a player for logging purposes.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Services.ZoneEventBridge.GetPreviousZone(Unity.Entities.Entity)
member.summary: Gets the previous zone for a player for logging purposes.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Models.GlowZoneEntry
member.summary: Represents a glow zone entry with position, rotation, and prefab information.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Models.BloodType
member.summary: Canonical blood type prefab hashes with compatibility aliases.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Models.ZoneLifecycleState
member.summary: Zone lifecycle states for explicit state machine.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Models.PlayerZoneState
member.summary: Represents a player's current zone state with explicit state machine.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Models.PlayerZoneState.IsStable
member.summary: Checks if the player is in a stable state (no active transitions).

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Models.PlayerZoneState.IsTransitioning
member.summary: Checks if the player is in a transition state.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Models.PlayerZoneState.IsInCooldown
member.summary: Checks if the player is in cooldown period.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfig
member.summary:
Zone-Lifecycle wiring configuration model for V Rising mods.
Architecture: VAutoZone monitors player positions → Determines which stages to trigger → Passes stage names to Vlifecycle → Vlifecycle executes stage actions
Three-Stage Lifecycle Pattern: - onEnter: One-time effects when crossing INTO a zone (store inventory, apply zone buffs, send messages) - isInZone: Repeated effects while player remains INSIDE zone (reassert invariants, buff enforcement) - onExit: One-time effects when crossing OUT of zone (restore inventory, remove buffs, cleanup)
This design follows V Rising's eventually consistent ECS architecture where systems may invalidate state and mods must reassert intent rather than assuming permanence.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfig.Enabled
member.summary: Enable zone-to-lifecycle event wiring

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfig.CheckIntervalMs
member.summary: How often to check player positions for zone transitions (milliseconds)

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfig.PositionChangeThreshold
member.summary: Distance threshold to consider a position change significant enough to check zones

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfig.IsInZoneIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Interval in seconds for isInZone stage reassertion Lower values = more responsive but higher server load

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfig.Mappings
member.summary: Zone ID to lifecycle stage mappings

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfig.WildcardMapping
member.summary: Wildcard zone mapping applies to any zone without explicit configuration

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleStages
member.summary:
Defines which lifecycle stages should fire for a specific zone.
Design Philosophy: - onEnter: One-time setup (store state, apply markers, send messages) - isInZone: Continuous enforcement (reapply buffs, enforce blood type, validate config) - onExit: Cleanup (restore state, remove markers, log departure)
Each stage maps to a named stage in Vlifecycle's stage registry. Vlifecycle owns the actual action execution; VAutoZone only selects stages.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleStages.OnEnterStage
member.summary: Stage name to trigger when player enters this zone. Use "{ZoneId}" placeholder for zone-specific stages: "zone.{ZoneId}.onEnter" Set to empty string to disable onEnter for this zone.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleStages.IsInZoneStage
member.summary: Stage name to trigger repeatedly while player remains in zone. Use "{ZoneId}" placeholder for zone-specific stages: "zone.{ZoneId}.isInZone" Set to empty string to disable isInZone for this zone.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleStages.OnExitStage
member.summary: Stage name to trigger when player exits this zone. Use "{ZoneId}" placeholder for zone-specific stages: "zone.{ZoneId}.onExit" Set to empty string to disable onExit for this zone.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleStages.UseWildcardDefaults
member.summary: If true, use WildcardMapping when no explicit mapping exists for a zone. If false, no stages will fire for unmapped zones.

member.name: P:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleStages.ConfigBundle
member.summary: Optional zone-specific configuration bundle to load. Referenced in Vlifecycle config as a ConfigAction.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Configuration.PlayerZoneState
member.summary: Player zone tracking state maintained by ZoneEventBridge. Used to detect transitions and track isInZone timing. Uses DateTime for reliable server-side timing.

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfigExtensions
member.summary: Helper methods for zone lifecycle configuration

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfigExtensions.GetStagesForZone(VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfig,System.String,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Get the stage configuration for a given zone ID

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfigExtensions.ShouldTriggerIsInZone(VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleStages,VAutomationCore.Configuration.PlayerZoneState,System.Single)
member.summary: Check if isInZone stage should fire based on timing. Uses DateTime for reliable server-side timing.

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfigExtensions.BuildStageName(VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleStages,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Build stage name with zone ID interpolation

member.name: M:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneLifecycleConfigExtensions.DetectZoneTransition(VAutomationCore.Configuration.PlayerZoneState,System.String,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Detect zone transition based on position

member.name: T:VAutomationCore.Configuration.ZoneTransition
member.summary: Represents a zone transition event

member.name: T:VAuto.Core.Json.PrefabGuidJsonConverter
member.summary: Serializes PrefabGUID as a long (GuidHash), and deserializes from: - number: -123 - string: "-123" or "Prefab_Name" - object: { "guidHash": -123 } / { "GuidHash": -123 }
